# Civil Engineering

Established 2008

[Faculty](/departments/civil/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To be a center of excellence in civil engineering education and sustainable infrastructure development.

### Mission

* Provide comprehensive education in civil engineering
* Encourage research in structural, environmental, and geotechnical engineering
* Develop professionals committed to sustainable development
* Build partnerships with construction industry leaders

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Civil Engineering

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

### M.E. Structural Engineering

Duration: 2 yearsIntake: 18

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Surveying Lab
* Strength of Materials Lab
* Concrete Technology Lab
* Environmental Engineering Lab
* CAD Lab
* Geotechnical Lab
